name: Austrian Cream Cheese Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, cinnamon and butter. Beat until crumbly and well blended.
3. Press mixture into an ungreased 13x9-inch pan. Bake for 12 minutes. Remove from oven.
4. In a small bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, flour and eggs until smooth. Stir in chocolate chips. Pour over partially baked crust.
5. Bake for an additional 15 to 20 minutes or until topping is almost set. Remove from oven.
6. Sprinkle remaining chocolate chips over top. Return to oven for 1 minute to melt chips.
7. Gently spread melted chips over top. Sprinkle with pecans. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
8. Cut into bars and store in refrigerator.
